title: Shared Advancements
description: Share advancements with your team or with all players with this server-side mod!
body:
# ![Shared Advancements](https://i.imgur.com/G7KAhEs.png)

**Shared Advancements** is a simple mod that allows teams to share advancements. 

## Usage

To use this feature, simply create a team with the [/team command](https://minecraft.wiki/w/Commands/team "Team Command - Minecraft Wiki").  
There is also a configuration option that broadcasts advancements to all players, not just the team.

Only the server needs this mod, on the client it is used only for LAN worlds.

## Modpacks

Feel free to use **Shared Advancements** in your Modpack!
